title: rubus corylifolius subsp. dumetorum
intro: Rubus corylifolius subsp. dumetorum, also known as Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan black raspberry, is a subspecies of the Rubus corylifolius plant, native to the Himalayan region and other parts of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus corylifolius subsp. dumetorum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and prevent certain types of cancer, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, tincture, or extract, and is also used in herbal formulations to support overall health and well-being.
